name: Holy Bells
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on buildings built.

name: Angelic Determination
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on spells cast this Era.
formula: (2 * ln(1+x)^3)%, where x = spells cast this Era

name: Angel Feathers
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on active spells.

name: Guardian Angels
effect: Increase base production of Cathedrals/Dark Temples/Monasteries (by alignment) by +98,000 and increase their production based on their quantity.
formula: (40 + 40 * x^0.4)%, where x = Cathedrals/Dark Temples/Monasteries built

name: Angelic Wisdom
effect: Increase spell durations and multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration by 50%.

name: Archangel Feathers
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Mana Regeneration.

name: Magical Gates
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on time spent as Good this Reincarnation.
formula: +(15 + x^0.7), where x = Good time this Reincarnation

name: Angelic Domination
effect: Increase production bonus from Gems based on God's Hand activity time this Era. Also reduce the cost of all spells by 50%.
formula: +(0.3 * x^0.7)%, where x = God's Hand activity time this Era

name: Wings of Liberty
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on duration of your longest spell.
formula: (6 * x^0.6)%, where x = longest spell duration

name: Heaven's Brilliance
effect: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on the highest amount of Holy Sites built this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = highest Holy Sites this Reincarnation

name: Sacred Ground
effect: Increase spell duration based on time spent as Order this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = Order time this Reincarnation

name: Divine Providence
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration multiplicatively based on spells cast this Era.
formula: (1.5 * ln(1+x)^2)%, where x = spells cast this Era
